rows.qual:
((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ((operations op
     JOIN projects pr ON ((pr.id = op.project_id)))
     JOIN organization_members om ON ((om.organization_id = pr.organization_id)))
  WHERE ((op.id = control_plan_rows.operation_id) AND (om.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (om.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::app_role, 'champion'::app_role, 'engineer'::app_role]))))) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM profiles p
  WHERE ((p.id = auth.uid()) AND (p.global_role = 'admin'::text)))))
